content.text:
Now I understand the issue clearly. Looking at `MultiLineIfElseRule.kt` line 98:

```kotlin
if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
```

When the THEN block is empty (as in `if ("b" == "c")` without any body), `node.firstChildNode` is null, causing the NPE.

The same issue could exist at line 113:
```kotlin
emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
```

And in `IfElseBracingRule.kt`, there are similar potential issues at lines 89, 110, and 120 where `firstChildNode` is accessed without null checks.

Let me fix both files:

 31тЖТ/**

 33тЖТ */
 34тЖТpublic class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 35тЖТ    StandardRule(
 36тЖТ        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37тЖТ        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38тЖТ            setOf(
 39тЖТ                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40тЖТ                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41тЖТ            ),
 42тЖТ    ) {
 43тЖТ    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 44тЖТ
 45тЖТ    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46тЖТ        indentConfig =
 47тЖТ            IndentConfig(
 48тЖТ                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 49тЖТ                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 50тЖТ            )
 51тЖТ    }
 52тЖТ
 53тЖТ    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
 55тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57тЖТ    ) {
 58тЖТ        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59тЖТ            return
 60тЖТ        }
 61тЖТ
 62тЖТ        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63тЖТ        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64тЖТ            return
 65тЖТ        }
 66тЖТ
 67тЖТ        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68тЖТ            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69тЖТ            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70тЖТ        ) {
 71тЖТ            // Allow
 72тЖТ            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73тЖТ            //     "bar1"
 74тЖТ            // } else if (bar2) {
 75тЖТ            //     null
 76тЖТ            // } else {
 77тЖТ            //     null
 78тЖТ            // } ?: "something-else"
 79тЖТ            return
 80тЖТ        }
 81тЖТ
 82тЖТ        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83тЖТ            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84тЖТ            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85тЖТ        ) {
 86тЖТ            // Allow
 87тЖТ            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88тЖТ            //     "bar1"
 89тЖТ            // } else if (bar2) {
 90тЖТ            //     "bar2"
 91тЖТ            // } else {
 92тЖТ            //     "bar3"
 93тЖТ            // }.plus("foo")
 94тЖТ            return
 95тЖТ        }
 96тЖТ
 97тЖТ        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98тЖТ            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99тЖТ                // Allow single line for:
100тЖТ                // else if (...)
101тЖТ                return
102тЖТ            }
103тЖТ            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104тЖТ                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105тЖТ                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106тЖТ                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107тЖТ                return
108тЖТ            }
109тЖТ
110тЖТ            Unit
111тЖТ        }
112тЖТ
113тЖТ        emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
114тЖТ        if (autoCorrect) {
115тЖТ            autocorrect(node)
116тЖТ        }
117тЖТ    }
118тЖТ
119тЖТ    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120тЖТ        val prevLeaves =
121тЖТ            node
122тЖТ                .leaves(forward = false)
123тЖТ                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124тЖТ                .toList()
125тЖТ                .reversed()
126тЖТ        val nextLeaves =
127тЖТ            node
128тЖТ                .leaves(forward = true)
129тЖТ                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130тЖТ                .toList()
131тЖТ                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132тЖТ
133тЖТ        prevLeaves
134тЖТ            .firstOrNull()
135тЖТ            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136тЖТ            ?.let {
137тЖТ                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138тЖТ            }
139тЖТ        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140тЖТ            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141тЖТ            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142тЖТ            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143тЖТ            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144тЖТ            prevLeaves
145тЖТ                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146тЖТ                .forEach(::addChild)
147тЖТ            addChild(previousChild)
148тЖТ            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149тЖТ            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150тЖТ            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
151тЖТ        }
152тЖТ
153тЖТ        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
154тЖТ        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
155тЖТ            node
156тЖТ                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
157тЖТ                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
158тЖТ        }
159тЖТ    }
160тЖТ}

content.text:
All existing tests pass. The fix is straightforward:

## Summary of Changes

### Root Cause
The `MultiLineIfElseRule` at line 98 calls `node.firstChildNode.elementType` without null safety. When an if-else statement has an empty THEN block (e.g., `if ("b" == "c") else { }`), `firstChildNode` is null, causing a `NullPointerException`.

### Fix in `MultiLineIfElseRule.kt`
Added an early return guard clause before line 97 (now line 97-100) that checks if `node.firstChildNode == null`. If the THEN or ELSE block is empty, the rule simply returns without trying to process it, preventing the NPE.

### Fix in `IfElseBracingRule.kt` 
Added null checks before calling `visitBranchWithoutBraces` for both `thenNode` and `elseNode` (lines 85-86 and 89-91). The `visitBranchWithoutBraces` method accesses `node.firstChildNode.startOffset` which would also NPE if the node has no children. This protects against the same empty THEN/ELSE block scenario.

 27тЖТimport org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28тЖТimport org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 29тЖТimport org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 30тЖТ
 31тЖТ/**
 32тЖТ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 33тЖТ */
 34тЖТpublic class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 35тЖТ    StandardRule(
 36тЖТ        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37тЖТ        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38тЖТ            setOf(
 39тЖТ                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40тЖТ                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41тЖТ            ),
 42тЖТ    ) {
 43тЖТ    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 44тЖТ
 45тЖТ    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46тЖТ        indentConfig =
 47тЖТ            IndentConfig(
 48тЖТ                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 49тЖТ                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 50тЖТ            )
 51тЖТ    }
 52тЖТ
 53тЖТ    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
 55тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57тЖТ    ) {
 58тЖТ        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59тЖТ            return
 60тЖТ        }
 61тЖТ
 62тЖТ        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63тЖТ        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64тЖТ            return
 65тЖТ        }
 66тЖТ
 67тЖТ        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68тЖТ            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69тЖТ            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70тЖТ        ) {
 71тЖТ            // Allow
 72тЖТ            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73тЖТ            //     "bar1"
 74тЖТ            // } else if (bar2) {
 75тЖТ            //     null
 76тЖТ            // } else {
 77тЖТ            //     null
 78тЖТ            // } ?: "something-else"
 79тЖТ            return
 80тЖТ        }
 81тЖТ
 82тЖТ        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83тЖТ            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84тЖТ            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85тЖТ        ) {
 86тЖТ            // Allow
 87тЖТ            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88тЖТ            //     "bar1"
 89тЖТ            // } else if (bar2) {
 90тЖТ            //     "bar2"
 91тЖТ            // } else {
 92тЖТ            //     "bar3"
 93тЖТ            // }.plus("foo")
 94тЖТ            return
 95тЖТ        }
 96тЖТ
 97тЖТ        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98тЖТ            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99тЖТ                // Allow single line for:
100тЖТ                // else if (...)
101тЖТ                return
102тЖТ            }
103тЖТ            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104тЖТ                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105тЖТ                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106тЖТ                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107тЖТ                return
108тЖТ            }
109тЖТ
110тЖТ            Unit
111тЖТ        }
112тЖТ
113тЖТ        emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
114тЖТ        if (autoCorrect) {
115тЖТ            autocorrect(node)
116тЖТ        }
117тЖТ    }
118тЖТ
119тЖТ    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120тЖТ        val prevLeaves =
121тЖТ            node
122тЖТ                .leaves(forward = false)
123тЖТ                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124тЖТ                .toList()
125тЖТ                .reversed()
126тЖТ        val nextLeaves =
127тЖТ            node
128тЖТ                .leaves(forward = true)
129тЖТ                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130тЖТ                .toList()
131тЖТ                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132тЖТ
133тЖТ        prevLeaves
134тЖТ            .firstOrNull()
135тЖТ            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136тЖТ            ?.let {
137тЖТ                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138тЖТ            }
139тЖТ        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140тЖТ            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141тЖТ            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142тЖТ            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143тЖТ            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144тЖТ            prevLeaves
145тЖТ                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146тЖТ                .forEach(::addChild)
147тЖТ            addChild(previousChild)
148тЖТ            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149тЖТ            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150тЖТ            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
151тЖТ        }
152тЖТ
153тЖТ        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
154тЖТ        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
155тЖТ            node
156тЖТ                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
157тЖТ                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
158тЖТ        }
159тЖТ    }
160тЖТ}

 33тЖТ */
 34тЖТpublic class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 35тЖТ    StandardRule(
 36тЖТ        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37тЖТ        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38тЖТ            setOf(
 39тЖТ                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40тЖТ                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41тЖТ            ),
 42тЖТ    ) {
 43тЖТ    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 44тЖТ
 45тЖТ    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46тЖТ        indentConfig =
 47тЖТ            IndentConfig(
 48тЖТ                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 49тЖТ                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 50тЖТ            )
 51тЖТ    }
 52тЖТ
 53тЖТ    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
 55тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57тЖТ    ) {
 58тЖТ        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59тЖТ            return
 60тЖТ        }
 61тЖТ
 62тЖТ        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63тЖТ        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64тЖТ            return
 65тЖТ        }
 66тЖТ
 67тЖТ        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68тЖТ            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69тЖТ            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70тЖТ        ) {
 71тЖТ            // Allow
 72тЖТ            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73тЖТ            //     "bar1"
 74тЖТ            // } else if (bar2) {
 75тЖТ            //     null
 76тЖТ            // } else {
 77тЖТ            //     null
 78тЖТ            // } ?: "something-else"
 79тЖТ            return
 80тЖТ        }
 81тЖТ
 82тЖТ        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83тЖТ            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84тЖТ            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85тЖТ        ) {
 86тЖТ            // Allow
 87тЖТ            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88тЖТ            //     "bar1"
 89тЖТ            // } else if (bar2) {
 90тЖТ            //     "bar2"
 91тЖТ            // } else {
 92тЖТ            //     "bar3"
 93тЖТ            // }.plus("foo")
 94тЖТ            return
 95тЖТ        }
 96тЖТ
 97тЖТ        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98тЖТ            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99тЖТ                // Allow single line for:
100тЖТ                // else if (...)
101тЖТ                return
102тЖТ            }
103тЖТ            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104тЖТ                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105тЖТ                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106тЖТ                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107тЖТ                return
108тЖТ            }
109тЖТ
110тЖТ            Unit
111тЖТ        }
112тЖТ
113тЖТ        emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
114тЖТ        if (autoCorrect) {
115тЖТ            autocorrect(node)
116тЖТ        }
117тЖТ    }
118тЖТ
119тЖТ    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120тЖТ        val prevLeaves =
121тЖТ            node
122тЖТ                .leaves(forward = false)
123тЖТ                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124тЖТ                .toList()
125тЖТ                .reversed()
126тЖТ        val nextLeaves =
127тЖТ            node
128тЖТ                .leaves(forward = true)
129тЖТ                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130тЖТ                .toList()
131тЖТ                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132тЖТ
133тЖТ        prevLeaves
134тЖТ            .firstOrNull()
135тЖТ            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136тЖТ            ?.let {
137тЖТ                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138тЖТ            }
139тЖТ        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140тЖТ            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141тЖТ            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142тЖТ            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143тЖТ            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144тЖТ            prevLeaves
145тЖТ                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146тЖТ                .forEach(::addChild)
147тЖТ            addChild(previousChild)
148тЖТ            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149тЖТ            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150тЖТ            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
151тЖТ        }
152тЖТ
153тЖТ        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
154тЖТ        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
155тЖТ            node
156тЖТ                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
157тЖТ                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
158тЖТ        }
159тЖТ    }
160тЖТ}

130тЖТ    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
131тЖТ        val prevLeaves =
132тЖТ            node
133тЖТ                .leaves(forward = false)
134тЖТ                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
135тЖТ                .toList()
136тЖТ                .reversed()
137тЖТ        val nextLeaves =
138тЖТ            node
139тЖТ                .leaves(forward = true)
140тЖТ                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
141тЖТ                .toList()
142тЖТ                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
143тЖТ
144тЖТ        prevLeaves
145тЖТ            .firstOrNull()
146тЖТ            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }

148тЖТ                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
149тЖТ            }

151тЖТ            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
152тЖТ            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
153тЖТ            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
154тЖТ            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
155тЖТ            prevLeaves
156тЖТ                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
157тЖТ                .forEach(::addChild)
158тЖТ            addChild(previousChild)
159тЖТ            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
160тЖТ            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
161тЖТ            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
162тЖТ        }
163тЖТ
164тЖТ        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
165тЖТ        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
166тЖТ            node
167тЖТ                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
